duration_seconds.description: Heart-rate curve duration buckets in seconds. Defaults to 5,15,30,60,300,1200,3600 seconds; point values are heart_rate_bpm.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream curve arrays and activity maps.

sport.description: Optional intervals.icu sport/type filter for the upstream type parameter. Omit to let upstream aggregate its default heart-rate curve set.
